sidebar.heading: Providers
sidebar.empty:
No providers yet.
Click + to add one.
panel.unselected.primary: Select a provider to configure it,
panel.unselected.secondary: or click + to add a new one.
panel.defaultDescription: Configure the settings for this provider.
basic.heading: Basic
basic.name.label: Name
basic.name.description: A display name for this provider.
basic.type.label: Type
basic.type.description: The provider interface to use for this entry.
basic.apiKey.label: API Key
basic.apiKey.description: The secret key used to authenticate with the provider.
basic.baseUrl.label: Base URL
basic.baseUrl.description.optional: Override the built-in endpoint. Leave empty to use the default.
basic.model.label: Model
basic.model.description: The model identifier to route requests to.
models.heading: Models
advanced.heading: Advanced
advanced.defaultProvider.label: Default Provider
advanced.defaultProvider.description: Mark this provider as the default for all gateway requests.
advanced.passthroughAuth.label: Passthrough Auth
advanced.passthroughAuth.description: Forward the client's Authorization header directly to the upstream.
